description: This Java class 'OfficerService' contains business logic for officer workflows in a loan application system, including queue management, application detail retrieval, and decision override functionality.

classes.name: OfficerService
classes.description: Service class implementing officer workflow logic such as queue listing, application detail retrieval, and decision override with audit and notification integration.

methods.name: queue
methods.description: Returns a filtered list of loan applications for the officer queue, sorted by submission date.

methods.name: getApplicationDetail
methods.description: Retrieves detailed information of a specific loan application draft for review.

methods.name: overrideDecision
methods.description: Overrides the decision on a loan application, logs an audit event, and sends a notification.

methods.name: toQueueItem
methods.description: Converts a LoanApplicationDraft object into a QueueItem DTO.

methods.name: toDetail
methods.description: Converts a LoanApplicationDraft object into an ApplicationDetail DTO.
